title: GROMACS Web UI: An LLM-Guided Web Interface for Autonomous MD Simulation
description: A FastAPI + vanilla JS web application that uses LLMs (Claude, Codex, Gemini) to autonomously execute GROMACS simulation tutorials via a skills-based pipeline (env-builder, md-runner, illustrator). Supports 8 tutorial systems including Lysozyme, KALP15 membrane, Protein-Ligand, Umbrella Sampling, and Free Energy Perturbation.
